markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Hand off the project to a new strategist and align on next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategist Handoff:** Matthew Alves-Hill (GrowthX) is taking over from Aida Knezevic for Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [**New Content Pipeline:** An agentic AI pipeline (using EXA/Tavily) is live. It self-grades research and flags unverified claims for manual review, a critical feature for Rimkus's high-stakes content.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**Content Audit Actions:** A full audit is complete, recommending 32 refreshes, 14 optimizations, and 192 removals. The team will integrate these actions into the weekly cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**Forensics Content Strategy:** Jen will review 34 existing topics and submit new cluster requests (e.g., Transportation, Injury Biomechanics) to align with forensics priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)

## Topics

### Project Handoff & New Strategist

  - [Matthew Alves-Hill (GrowthX) is the new strategist for Phase 2, taking over from Aida Knezevic.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Matthew has experience with high-stakes content for legal clients, which is directly relevant to Rimkus's needs for accuracy and risk mitigation.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Aida will remain in the Slack channel for support and content review.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)

### New Agentic Content Pipeline

  - [An agentic AI pipeline is live to improve content quality and accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=454.0)
  - [**Key Upgrades:**](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [**Research:** Uses EXA/Tavily (vs. Perplexity) for more relevant, authority-constrained searches (e.g., government sites).](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [**Self-Correction:** The AI generates research questions, grades its own answers (1-5 score), and re-researches low-confidence topics.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Source Validation:** Requires primary sources for all statistics; cannot use stats from secondary sources like blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [**Risk Mitigation:**](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
      - [**Flagging Unverified Claims:** The AI flags claims it cannot verify with credible sources.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [**Manual Review:** Rimkus requested a pipeline step to explicitly annotate these flagged claims for manual review by a technical expert.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This ensures accuracy, builds internal credibility, and reduces legal/financial risk.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)

### Content Audit & Optimization

  - [A full content audit is complete, with recommendations now in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**Recommended Actions:**](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
      - [**Refresh:** 32 high-priority articles](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
      - [**Optimize:** 14 medium-priority articles](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
      - [**Remove:** 192 articles (e.g., duplicates, empty pages, 404s)](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
  - [**New Opportunities:** The audit identified new article ideas with strong SEO potential (e.g., "California Balcony Code," "What's a Legal Nurse Consultant").](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1326.0)

### Forensics Content Strategy

  - [Aida added 34 forensics-related blog ideas to the Content OS for review.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [**Alignment Gap:** These topics are mapped to existing BES clusters, but forensics leaders have priorities outside of them.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [**New Priority Areas:**](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [Transportation (Injury Biomechanics, Vehicle Accident Reconstruction)](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [Digital Forensics](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
      - [Electrical Engineering](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [**Process:** Jen will review the 34 topics and submit requests for new clusters to Matthew in Slack, including any supporting materials.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)

### Performance & Cadence

  - [**Performance:** The "Structural Engineering and Code Compliance" cluster is generating the most clicks.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
  - [**Review Cadence:** Alishia will continue the "bundle of 5" review process.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [**Meeting Time Change:** The weekly sync will move to 30 minutes earlier (7:30 AM PT / 9:30 AM CT) to accommodate Alishia's schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Jen:**](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
      - [Review the 34 forensics topics in the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
      - [Submit new cluster requests (e.g., Transportation, Digital Forensics) to Matthew in Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [**Alishia:**](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
      - [Continue reviewing articles in bundles of 5.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1425.0)
  - [**Rimkus Team (Jen, Alishia, Nora):**](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [Plan the integration of content audit actions (refreshes, removals) into the weekly cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
      - [Conduct keyword research for new forensics clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
      - [Add refresh opportunities from the audit to the Content OS.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
      - [Reschedule the weekly sync for 30 minutes earlier.](https://fathom.video/share/Yz8YG157S45Sdx3vWVySbRXxvLE_wj6M?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
